Hostel Policies 
 
 
 
1. Policy on accommodation charges for R&D Project Staff.  
 
(a) Accommodation fees will be ₹3000 per month.  
(b) Resident would be required to vacate the room within one week after the termination   
/ withdrawal / completion of the project and no refund of the fees paid would be 
provided.  
(c) Accommodation fees would be required to be paid in advance for the number of 
months approved. For further extension, accommodation would be provided subject 
to availability and payment of applicable fees in advance. 
 
 
2. Policy on accommodation charges for students staying in hostel during break/ 
vacation period.  
 
(a) Students involved in Inter IIT Sports, Inter IIT Cultural Meet, Inter IIT Sci-Tech Meet, 
Fluxus and Placements, required to stay during the break/vacation period will also 
be allowed to stay in the Hostel, post approval by Student Affairs Section. 
(b) Allotment Procedure: Recommendation from the respective Faculty Advisor and

be allowed to stay in the Hostel, post approval by Student Affairs Section. 
(b) Allotment Procedure: Recommendation from the respective Faculty Advisor and 
Head of Department should be submitted to the Office of Chief Warden at least 5 
working days before the date of commencement of stay. The request received 
should be recommended by Warden of the respective Hostel where accommodation 
is being provided and approved by the Chief Warden. 
(c) Charges applicable:   
For upto 15 days of stay   
 
 
- ₹1,500/-  
            
For more than 15 days and upto 30 days 
- ₹3,000/- 
            
For more than 30 days and upto 60 days 
- ₹6,000/- 
            
For more than 60 days upto the end of vacation- ₹8,000/- 
(d) Exemption: No accommodation charges will be charged to students involved in 
Inter IIT Sports, Inter IIT Cultural Meet, Inter IIT Sci-Tech Meet, Fluxus & 
Placements and staying with prior approval of Student Affairs Section.

Inter IIT Sports, Inter IIT Cultural Meet, Inter IIT Sci-Tech Meet, Fluxus & 
Placements and staying with prior approval of Student Affairs Section. 
(e) Payment: Post receipt of approval of Chief Warden, room would be allotted only 
after the full payment has been received in advance. No pro-rata rates would be 
applicable. 
(f) Dining Charges: The dining charges will be as applicable by the Institute and 
payment is to be done in advance. 
 
 
3. Policy on staying in hostel after Thesis submission and Viva for Ph.D and MS(R) 
Scholars.  
 
(a) After thesis submission, Ph.D students can retain their accommodation in the hostel 
for one week without paying any accommodation fee. For accommodation of more

2 of 2 
 
than one week, and if the accommodation period spills over the next semester, 
students must take prior approval from the Chief Warden through recommendations 
from the Research Supervisor/ HOD. The accommodation fees will be either ₹3000 
per month or semester fees (presently ₹16,000) as applicable from time to time.  
(b) After the Ph.D viva examination, students can retain their accommodation in the 
hostel for one week without paying any accommodation fee.  For accommodation of 
more than one week, students must take prior approval from the Chief Warden 
through recommendations from Research Supervisor/ HoD and will pay 
accommodation charges as applicable for alumni from time to time (presently 
₹6000/- per month). 
(c) The accommodation fees would be required to pay in advance. In case, the student 
opts for monthly charges, consolidated advance payment, in full, is to be done for 
the number of months approved. For further extension, accommodation would be

opts for monthly charges, consolidated advance payment, in full, is to be done for 
the number of months approved. For further extension, accommodation would be 
provided subject to availability and payment of applicable fees in advance. 
 
 
4. Policy on retaining of accommodation by students after completion of course.  
 
(a) Retention of accommodation should be continued with the completion of the course. 
(b) Students who have completed their course, may be allowed to retain their 
accommodation free of charge for a maximum of 15 days to complete the formalities 
and their needs, provided he/she has registered for the ongoing semester and the 
requirement of accommodation for these 15 days fall within the completion of the 
registered semester. If these 15 days falling beyond the registered semester period, 
then Rs.300/- per day may be charged for the period of 15 days falling beyond the 
registered semester period.

registered semester. If these 15 days falling beyond the registered semester period, 
then Rs.300/- per day may be charged for the period of 15 days falling beyond the 
registered semester period.  
(c) On stay for more than 15 days, prior recommendation from his/her Research 
Supervisor and HoD and approval of Dean of Academic Affairs office is mandatory 
and must pay the accommodation charges as per the following: 
 
Monthly charges upto 60 days 
For more than 60 days stay up to 180 days 
₹6000/- per 30 days 
Semester Hostel fees as per the existing rates. 
 
 
5. Policy on cancellation charges on booked accommodations. 
 
(a) Cancelled 3 days before the date of arrival of first guest - No cancellation charge 
(b) Cancelled between 3 to 2 days (both inclusive) from the date of arrival of first guest - 
25% of accommodation charge for the entire duration of booking. 
(c) Cancelled 1 day before the date of arrival of the first guest - 50% of the

25% of accommodation charge for the entire duration of booking. 
(c) Cancelled 1 day before the date of arrival of the first guest - 50% of the 
accommodation charge for the entire duration of booking.
